title: pseudostifftia kingii
intro: Pseudostifftia kingii, also known as King's Plant, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pseudostifftia kingii include its ability to reduce fever, soothe respiratory issues, and alleviate digestive problems. Pseudostifftia kingii can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
